result.summary: Found 2 major layout issues: several horizontal content areas are clipped on the right edge, and the fixed bottom navigation is overlapping the game grid.

issues.description: The top category row and multiple game tiles are cut off on the right side, indicating the page is not fitting the mobile viewport cleanly and content is overflowing horizontally.
issues.suggestion: Make the carousel/grid fully responsive for this breakpoint, reduce tile widths, or allow proper horizontal scrolling so cards are never partially hidden.

issues.description: The fixed bottom navigation bar covers the lower game tiles, leaving part of the content inaccessible and visually obscured.
issues.suggestion: Add enough bottom padding/margin to the page content to account for the fixed footer, or make the bottom nav non-overlapping.
